subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the presence of the Mighty, the All-Powerful, the All-Forgiving, unto them that have detached themselves from all faces and have turned towards Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی العزیز المقتدر الغفار للذینهم انقطعوا عن کل الوجوه و توجهوا
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
